items.name_en: 。🌷《With full original red box packaging》🌷【New】 GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, crafted to be a collectible choice for years to come. items.name_en: 。🌷《With full original red box packaging》🌷【New】 Gucci Blondie series new handbag featuring the brand's classic logo first seen in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style, perfectly interpreting the brand's classic design and modern essence. This small shoulder bag is crafted from black patent leather, featuring enamel brand circular logo, and comes with a gold-tone chain shoulder strap.
items.name_cn:
。🌷《With full original red box packaging》🌷【New】 Gucci Blondie series new handbag featuring the brand's classic logo first seen in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style, perfectly interpreting the brand's classic design and modern essence. This small shoulder bag is crafted from black patent leather, featuring enamel brand circular logo, and comes with a gold-tone chain shoulder strap.
Black patent leather
Black patent leather trim
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Enamel circular interlocking GG
Inside: 1 zip pocket
Outside: 1 back open pocket
Removable chain shoulder strap (51cm long)
Magnetic snap closure
Model: 814952.
Size: 29.5cm (W) x 12.5cm (H) x 7cm (D)
Weight: approx. 900g
Color: Black patent leather/Original leather.
Fits iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, long wallet, and lipstick
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 。💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】Inspired by the brand's heritage, the interlocking Double G motif adds a touch of elegance to leather accessories. On this light pink leather card case, this 1970s-style motif radiates charm. The interior is thoughtfully designed with multiple compartments for various uses.

。💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】Inspired by the brand's heritage, the interlocking Double G motif adds a touch of elegance to leather accessories.
